mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PRODUCT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCTS ( PRODUCT_NO, SELLER_EMAIL, CATEGORY_NO, SALE_TYPE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_DESC, PRODUCT_CONDITION, TRADE_STATUS, TRADE_METHOD, VIEW_COUNT, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{productNo}, #{sellerEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryNo}, #{saleType}, #{productName}, #{productPrice}, #{productDesc, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{productCondition}, #{tradeStatus}, #{tradeMethod}, 0, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_PRODUCT_IMAGE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT_IMAGE ( PRD_IMG_NO, PRODUCT_NO, IMG_URL, ORGFILENAME, FILENAME, SORT_NO, IS_MAIN ) VALUES ( #{prdImgNo}, #{productNo}, #{imgUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgfilename, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filename, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNo}, #{isMain, jdbcType=CHAR} )

SELECT SEQ_PSO_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION ( OPTION_NO, PRODUCT_NO, PARCEL_TYPE, SHIPPING_FEE ) VALUES ( #{optionNo}, #{productNo}, #{parcelType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shippingFee} )

SELECT SEQ_PML_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION ( LOCATION_NO, PRODUCT_NO, PLACE_NAME, FULL_ADDRESS, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, SORT_NO ) VALUES ( #{locationNo}, #{productNo}, #{placeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fullAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{sortNo} )
mapper.select:
SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount,
(SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS placeName,
(SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS imgUrl
FROM PRODUCTS ORDER BY PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC

SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo, CATEGORY.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_DESC AS productDesc, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CONDITION AS productCondition, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate, MEMBER.NICKNAME AS sellerName, MEMBER.MANNER_TEMP AS mannerTemp, MEMBER.PROFILE_IMG AS sellerProfileImg,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO ) AS wishCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRANSACTIONS JOIN PRODUCTS P2 ON TRANSACTIONS.PRODUCT_NO = P2.PRODUCT_NO WHERE P2.SELLER_EMAIL = PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL AND P2.TRADE_STATUS = '판매완료' AND TRANSACTIONS.USE_ESCROW = 'Y' AND TRANSACTIONS.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE CHAT_ROOM.PRODUCT_NO = P2.PRODUCT_NO ) ) AS safePayCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEWS WHERE REVIEWS.TARGET_EMAIL = PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL ) AS reviewCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCTS P3 WHERE P3.SELLER_EMAIL = PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL AND P3.TRADE_STATUS = '판매완료' ) AS tradeCount,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wished
0 AS wished
FROM PRODUCTS LEFT JOIN CATEGORY ON PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO = CATEGORY.CATEGORY_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER ON PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = MEMBER.EMAIL WHERE PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}

SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRD_IMG_NO AS prdImgNo, PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL AS imgUrl, PRODUCT_IMAGE.ORGFILENAME AS orgfilename, PRODUCT_IMAGE.FILENAME AS filename, PRODUCT_IMAGE.SORT_NO AS sortNo, PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN AS isMain FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ORDER BY CASE WHEN PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, PRODUCT_IMAGE.SORT_NO

SELECT PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION.OPTION_NO AS optionNo, PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION.PARCEL_TYPE AS parcelType, PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION.SHIPPING_FEE AS shippingFee FROM PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION WHERE PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ORDER BY PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION.OPTION_NO

SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.LOCATION_NO AS locationNo, PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME AS placeName, PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.FULL_ADDRESS AS fullAddress, PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.LATITUDE AS latitude, PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.LONGITUDE AS longitude, PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.SORT_NO AS sortNo FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ORDER BY PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.SORT_NO

SELECT productNo, categoryNo, productName, productPrice, tradeStatus, tradeMethod, regDate, placeName, imgUrl FROM ( SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate,
( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS placeName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS imgUrl,
( ( CASE WHEN #{keyword1} IS NOT NULL AND #{keyword1} != '' AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword1}) || '%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN #{keyword2} IS NOT NULL AND #{keyword2} != '' AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword2}) || '%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN #{keyword3} IS NOT NULL AND #{keyword3} != '' AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword3}) || '%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) * 10 + CASE WHEN #{productPrice} IS NULL OR #{productPrice} = 0 THEN 0 WHEN ABS(NVL(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) - #{productPrice}) / #{productPrice} <= 0.1 THEN 25 WHEN ABS(NVL(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) - #{productPrice}) / #{productPrice} <= 0.2 THEN 15 WHEN ABS(NVL(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) - #{productPrice}) / #{productPrice} <= 0.3 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.REG_DATE >= SYSDATE - 3 THEN 10 WHEN PRODUCTS.REG_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END ) AS similarityScore,
ABS(NVL(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) - NVL(#{productPrice}, 0)) AS priceGap
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo} AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중' AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO != #{productNo} AND ( 1 = 0
OR LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword1}) || '%'
OR LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword2}) || '%'
OR LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword3}) || '%'
) ) ORDER BY similarityScore DESC, priceGap ASC, regDate DESC FETCH FIRST 12 ROWS ONLY

SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate,
( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS placeName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS imgUrl
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo} AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중'
AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO NOT IN
#{excludeProductNo}
ORDER BY ABS(NVL(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) - NVL(#{productPrice}, 0)) ASC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 12 ROWS ONLY
SELECT DISTINCT PRODUCT_NAME FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCT_NAME IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(PRODUCT_NAME)) > 0 AND LOWER(PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%' ORDER BY PRODUCT_NAME ASC

SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo,
( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS placeName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS imgUrl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wished
0 AS wished
,
CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중' THEN 1 WHEN PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} THEN 1 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE CHAT_ROOM.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND CHAT_ROOM.BUYER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS canAccessDetail
CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS canAccessDetail
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE 1 = 1
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.FULL_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{areaDong} || '%' )
AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중'
AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_METHOD = '택배'
AND PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE = '나눔'
AND PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo}
AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE >= #{priceMin}
AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE <= #{priceMax}
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE ASC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SEARCH_LOG ( SEARCH_ID, KEYWORD, SEARCH_TYPE, MEMBER_EMAIL, GUEST_ID, SESSION_ID, IP_ADDRESS, USER_AGENT, SEARCHED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_SEARCH_LOG_ID.NEXTVAL, #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{searchType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sessionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT keyword, searchCount FROM ( SELECT TRIM(SEARCH_LOG.KEYWORD) AS keyword, COUNT(*) AS searchCount FROM SEARCH_LOG WHERE SEARCH_LOG.SEARCH_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' AND SEARCH_LOG.SEARCHED_AT >= SYSTIMESTAMP - 7 AND SEARCH_LOG.KEYWORD IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(SEARCH_LOG.KEYWORD)) >= 2 GROUP BY TRIM(SEARCH_LOG.KEYWORD) HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, TRIM(SEARCH_LOG.KEYWORD) ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT productNo, productName, saleType, productPrice, tradeStatus, regDate, viewCount, categoryNo, placeName, imgUrl, wished, canAccessDetail FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE ASC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
) AS rno,
PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo,
( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS placeName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS imgUrl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wished
0 AS wished
,
CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중' THEN 1 WHEN PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} THEN 1 WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE CHAT_ROOM.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND CHAT_ROOM.BUYER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS canAccessDetail
CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS canAccessDetail
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE 1 = 1
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.FULL_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{areaDong} || '%' )
AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매중'
AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_METHOD = '택배'
AND PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE = '나눔'
AND PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo}
AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE >= #{priceMin}
AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE <= #{priceMax}
) WHERE rno BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

choose.when:
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT)), 0) AS avgPrice, NVL(MAX(TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT), 0) AS maxPrice, NVL(MIN(TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT), 0) AS minPrice, COUNT(*) AS sampleCount FROM TRANSACTIONS JOIN PRODUCTS ON TRANSACTIONS.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO WHERE TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT IS NOT NULL AND TRANSACTIONS.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND TRANSACTIONS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('거래중', '거래완료') AND NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 29
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
choose.otherwise:
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE)), 0) AS avgPrice, NVL(MAX(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE), 0) AS maxPrice, NVL(MIN(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE), 0) AS minPrice, COUNT(*) AS sampleCount FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE = '판매' AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE IS NOT NULL AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('판매중', '예약중', '판매완료') AND PRODUCTS.REG_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 29
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'

mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_LIST.PRICE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS priceDate, NVL(LIST_DATA.LIST_AVG_PRICE, 0) AS listAvgPrice, NVL(SALE_DATA.SALE_AVG_PRICE, 0) AS saleAvgPrice FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 29 + LEVEL - 1 AS PRICE_DATE FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 30 ) DATE_LIST
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(PRODUCTS.REG_DATE) AS PRICE_DATE, ROUND(AVG(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE)) AS LIST_AVG_PRICE FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE = '판매' AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE IS NOT NULL AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('판매중', '예약중', '판매완료') AND PRODUCTS.REG_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 29
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
GROUP BY TRUNC(PRODUCTS.REG_DATE) ) LIST_DATA ON DATE_LIST.PRICE_DATE = LIST_DATA.PRICE_DATE
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT)) AS PRICE_DATE, ROUND(AVG(TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT)) AS SALE_AVG_PRICE FROM TRANSACTIONS JOIN PRODUCTS ON TRANSACTIONS.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO WHERE TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT IS NOT NULL AND TRANSACTIONS.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND TRANSACTIONS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('거래중', '거래완료') AND NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 29
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
GROUP BY TRUNC(NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT)) ) SALE_DATA ON DATE_LIST.PRICE_DATE = SALE_DATA.PRICE_DATE
ORDER BY DATE_LIST.PRICE_DATE ASC

choose.when:
SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT AS productPrice, TRANSACTIONS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) AS regDate, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo,
( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS placeName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS imgUrl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wished
0 AS wished
FROM TRANSACTIONS JOIN PRODUCTS ON TRANSACTIONS.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO WHERE TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT IS NOT NULL AND TRANSACTIONS.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND TRANSACTIONS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('거래중', '거래완료') AND NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 29
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT DESC, NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) DESC
ORDER BY TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT ASC, NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) DESC
ORDER BY TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT DESC, NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) DESC
ORDER BY NVL(TRANSACTIONS.COMPLETE_DATE, TRANSACTIONS.APPROVED_AT) DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo,
( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS placeName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS imgUrl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wished
0 AS wished
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE = '판매' AND PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE IS NOT NULL AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('판매중', '예약중', '판매완료') AND PRODUCTS.REG_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 29
AND LOWER(PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE ASC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT MEMBER.EMAIL AS sellerEmail, MEMBER.NICKNAME AS sellerName, MEMBER.PROFILE_IMG AS sellerProfileImg, MEMBER.MANNER_TEMP AS mannerTemp,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEWS WHERE REVIEWS.TARGET_EMAIL = MEMBER.EMAIL ) AS reviewCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRANSACTIONS JOIN PRODUCTS ON TRANSACTIONS.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO WHERE PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = MEMBER.EMAIL AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매완료' AND TRANSACTIONS.USE_ESCROW = 'Y' AND TRANSACTIONS.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE CHAT_ROOM.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO ) ) AS safePayCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = MEMBER.EMAIL AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS = '판매완료' ) AS tradeCount
FROM PRODUCTS JOIN MEMBER ON PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = MEMBER.EMAIL WHERE PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}

SELECT productNo, productName, saleType, productPrice, tradeStatus, regDate, viewCount, categoryNo, placeName, imgUrl, wished FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE ASC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO ) DESC, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC
) AS rno,
PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE AS regDate, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo,
( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS placeName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS imgUrl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wished
0 AS wished
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = ( SELECT PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ) ) WHERE rno BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = ( SELECT PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} )
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_REPORT_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO REPORTS ( REPORT_ID, REPORTER_EMAIL, TARGET_EMAIL, TYPE_ID, PRODUCT_NUM, REVIEW_NUM, ROOM_ID, NOSQL_MSG_KEY, REPORT_DETAIL, REPORT_STATUS, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_IMG ) VALUES ( #{reportId}, #{reporterEmail}, #{targetEmail}, #{typeId}, #{productNum}, #{reviewNum, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{roomId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nosqlMsgKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportDetail}, '접수', SYSDATE, #{reportImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT reviewNo, writerEmail, targetEmail, transactionId, rating, oneLineCat, reviewContent, createdAt, writerName, productName, productImgUrl FROM ( SELECT REVIEWS.REVIEW_NO AS reviewNo, REVIEWS.WRITER_EMAIL AS writerEmail, REVIEWS.TARGET_EMAIL AS targetEmail, REVIEWS.TRANSACTION_ID AS transactionId, REVIEWS.RATING AS rating, REVIEWS.ONE_LINE_CAT AS oneLineCat, REVIEWS.REVIEW_CONTENT AS reviewContent, REVIEWS.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, MEMBER.NICKNAME AS writerName, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName,
( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS productImgUrl,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY REVIEWS.CREATED_AT DESC) AS rno
FROM PRODUCTS JOIN TRANSACTIONS ON PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO = TRANSACTIONS.PRODUCT_NO JOIN REVIEWS ON TRANSACTIONS.TRANSACTION_ID = REVIEWS.TRANSACTION_ID JOIN MEMBER ON REVIEWS.WRITER_EMAIL = MEMBER.EMAIL
WHERE REVIEWS.TARGET_EMAIL = ( SELECT PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ) ) WHERE rno BETWEEN 1 AND 3

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, NVL(ROUND(AVG(REVIEWS.RATING), 1), 0) AS avgRating,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN REVIEWS.ONE_LINE_CAT = '친절해요' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS kindCount, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN REVIEWS.ONE_LINE_CAT = '시간 약속 잘 지켜요' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS promiseCount, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN REVIEWS.ONE_LINE_CAT = '설명대로예요' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sameDescCount, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN REVIEWS.ONE_LINE_CAT = '꼼꼼해요' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS carefulCount
FROM REVIEWS WHERE REVIEWS.TARGET_EMAIL = ( SELECT PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} )
